About Me

Here is a little bit about me. I am in grade 11 at BSS and I have been attending BSS since I was in Grade 3 (2017). I love camp, playing guitar, skiing, playing sports, and The Blue Jays. I have been a Blue Jays fan since I was 6 months old! You can find an image of me at my first game below. As well, I learnt how to code in 2018 at an afterschool program and have picked it up again this year for ICS3U. My favourite subjects are Chemistry and Math and I am thinking of applying to Queens Universety for Engineering. I also love to read, particualarily mysteries and historical fiction.
